attributes.text: Per RBI digital lending guidelines, we ask only for what's strictly needed.
For nearest branch and serviceability check. Used only at app open.
To pre-fill reference contacts. We never store your full address book.
EMI reminders, application status and OTPs.
We do not access your photos, media or full contact list. Bank SMS access is not required — we use the Account Aggregator framework instead.

error.debugMessage:
Assertion '"Account Aggregator" is visible' failed. Check the UI hierarchy in debug artifacts to verify the element state and properties.

Possible causes:
- Element selector may be incorrect - check if there are similar elements with slightly different names/properties.
- Element may be temporarily unavailable due to loading state
- This could be a real regression that needs to be addressed
